rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban in any curriculum or training surface.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prior 'we're doing'/'We'll ask' author-we hits at lines 3 and 45 are no longer in the body — hand-fixed.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prework: rule 2(b) (2026-05-09 second pass) requires full 'Module N' forms. Body uses 'Module 1' throughout (lines 1, 3, 13, 17, 43); zero bare MN in body. Maintainer-block bare MN (lines 70–73) exempt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
